utterances.speaker: The Singing Man
utterances.text: Morning here ! Sunshine is here ! The sky is clear , the morning here ! The morning here !

emotion_cause.span: 1_Morning here ! Sunshine is here ! The sky is clear , the morning here ! The morning here !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: HEY ! ! Do you have to do that ? It’s Saturday !

utterances.speaker: The Singing Man
utterances.text: Oh come on ! Morning here ! Morning here ! The morning is here ! Sunshine is here !

emotion_cause.span: 3_Morning here ! Morning here ! The morning is here ! Sunshine is here !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Are you kidding ? I love that guy ! Morning here ! Morning is here ...

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Stop it ! I will kill you . I hate the fact that my room is so small .

emotion_cause.span: 6_I hate the fact that my room is so small .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , I have all the space I need . Just do what I did .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Monica , you do not even have a bed , you sleep in a ball on the floor !

emotion_cause.span: 8_you do not even have a bed , you sleep in a ball on the floor !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: You know what ? I am really tired of your bellyaching !

emotion_cause.span: 9_I am really tired of your bellyaching !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am sorry . I am so sorry .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I am really tired of your bellyaching !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: See , this is a great apartment .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Shut up ! This place is a hole !
